UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, CROSS DEFENDANT NANCY RYTI AND BOB KORMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO CARRY ITS BURDEN TO SHOW THAT ENTIRE CROSS-COMPLAINT ARISES FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY. THE ONLY ALLEGATION THE CROSS-COMPLAINT POINTED TO BY MOVING PARTY IS "BY INFLUENCING OR ATTEMPTING TO INFLUENCE CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO VACATE BY FRAUD, INTIMIDATION OR COERCION BY THREATENING CROSS-COMPLAINANT" IS FOUND IN FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION, PARAGRAPH 37. CROSS-COMPLAINT DOES NOT REFER TO ANY PROTECTED ACTIVITY SUGGESTED BY MOVING PARTY. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE ERNEST H GOLDSMITH, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar May-14-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT NANCY RYTI and BOB KORMAN's MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT is DENIED. Moving party failed to carry its burden to show that entire cross-complaint arises from protected activity. The only allegation the cross-complaint pointed to by moving party is "by influencing or attempting to influence Cross-Complainant to vacate by fraud, intimidation or coercion by threatening Cross-Complainant" is found in fourth cause of action, paragraph 37. Cross-complaint does not refer to any protected activity suggested by moving party. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ernest H Goldsmith, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Continued To May-01-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANTS NANCY RYTI, BOB KORMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT is transferred to be heard in Department 501 on May 1, 2013. Department 501 (Housing Court) hears landlord/tenant matters. See Local Rule 8.10. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
